ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security associated with the market data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data observation */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security during the trading session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security during the trading session */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on that date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price considering dividends and stock splits */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which prices are quoted */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone for the trading session */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in closing price from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol representing the security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of the security (e.g., stock, bond, derivative) */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the security is traded (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the security belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the security is registered */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Current market capitalization of the security */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the security's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value after the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time of the change event */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., correction, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data access */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, file, database) */,
  "authentication_method" TEXT /* Method of authentication (e.g., API key, OAuth) */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data sync */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market event */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security associated with the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., earnings report, acquisition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "impact" REAL /* Estimated impact of the event on the security's price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event information (e.g., news article, press release) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the event information */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the event entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_events_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price adjustment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry that was adjusted */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of the adjustment (e.g., stock split, dividend) */,
  "adjustment_value" REAL /* Value of the adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price adjustment (e.g., corporate action, error correction) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the adjustment entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the adjustment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_adjustments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the session took place */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the session */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading session (e.g., regular, extended) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "volume_traded" INTEGER /* Total volume traded during the session */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_market FOREIGN KEY ("market") REFERENCES securities ("market")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was created */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading strategy (e.g., long-term, short-term, day trading) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the trading strategy */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics to evaluate the performance of the strategy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
